title: Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) Screening: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:

Learn more about laboratory tests, reference ranges, and understanding results .
Is there anything else I need to know about autism spectrum disorder screening? 
In early childhood, pediatricians do routine developmental and behavioral screening tests designed to catch other types of developmental problems. These tests may miss ASD, so make sure your child's provider does ASD screening, too.
References 
Autism Research Institute [Internet]. San Diego (CA): c. 1967-2023. Autism Symptoms and Diagnosis in Adults; [cited 2023 Jun 10]; [about 10 screens]. Available from: https://autism.org/autism-symptoms-and-diagnosis-in-adults/ 
Autism Speaks [Internet]. Autism Speaks Inc.; c 2023. Adult Autism Diagnosis Tool Kit; [cited 2023 Jun 10]; [about 40 screens]. Available from: https://www.autismspeaks.org/tool-kit/adult-autism-diagnosis-tool-kit 
Autism spectrum disorder in adults: diagnosis and management. London: National Institute for Health and Care Excellence (NICE); 2021 Jun 14 [cited 2023 Jun 10] (NICE Clinical Guidelines, No. 142.) Available from: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK554918/ 
Centers for Disease Control and Prevention [Internet]. Atlanta: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services; Screening for Autism Spectrum Disorder; [reviewed 2022 Mar 31; cited 2023 Jun 14]; [about 2 screens]. Available from: https://www.cdc.gov/autism/d
